question: Which active knowledge categories were created after June 1, 2024, and in what order should they be displayed?
sql: SELECT id, name, code, description, sort_order, created_at FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`svc_knowledge_categories` WHERE is_active = true AND created_at > '2024-06-01 00:00:00' ORDER BY sort_order ASC

question: What are the renewal line details — including category name and line status — for all approved renewal lines, showing the unit price and total amount?
sql: SELECT rl.id AS line_id, kc.name AS category_name, kc.code AS category_code, rl.quantity, rl.unit_price, rl.total_amount, rl.discount_pct, rl.tax_amount, rl.line_status FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`svc_service_renewals_lines` rl JOIN `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`svc_knowledge_categories` kc ON rl.knowledge_categories_id = kc.id WHERE rl.line_status = 'approved' ORDER BY rl.total_amount DESC

question: For each knowledge category, what is the total revenue (sum of total_amount), total tax collected, and number of renewal lines, broken down by line status — limited to categories with more than one renewal line?
sql: SELECT kc.name AS category_name, rl.line_status, COUNT(rl.id) AS line_count, SUM(rl.total_amount) AS total_revenue, SUM(rl.tax_amount) AS total_tax FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`svc_service_renewals_lines` rl JOIN `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`svc_knowledge_categories` kc ON rl.knowledge_categories_id = kc.id GROUP BY kc.name, rl.line_status HAVING COUNT(rl.id) > 1 ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
